name: concourse
description: Concourse — Your AI companion at every gate, seat, and section. Smart-stadium GenAI companion built for PromptWars Virtual Challenge 4 (FIFA World Cup 2026).

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend
